ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved: Bug Fix Deployed to Production
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am pleased to inform you that Ticket #12345 has been resolved and the bug fix has been deployed to production. The issue was caused by a null pointer exception in the authentication module, which has now been corrected.

Steps taken:
1. Reviewed the stack trace and identified the faulty code.
2. Implemented null check and updated unit tests.
3. Pushed the changes to the develop branch and created a pull request.
4. Merged the PR into main and deployed to staging.
5. Verified the fix in production.

You can view the changes here: <URL>

If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out.

Thanks,
Rahul Sharma
Backend Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Zoom Meeting for Account Verification
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your account. To ensure the security of your funds, you must attend an urgent Zoom meeting to verify your identity. Please join the meeting at the scheduled time:

Date: 25th October 2023
Time: 02:30 PM IST
Zoom Meeting ID: 123 4567 8901
Passcode: 987654

Join the meeting using the link below:
<URL>

Kripya dhyan dein: Agar aap attend nahi karte, toh aapka account temporary suspend ho sakta hai.

Best Regards,
IT Support Team
XYZ Bank
